'''Damio''' was a company that manufactured [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] systems for use on [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. Damio sensors were part of the array fitted aboard the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']].<ref name="Riders" />

==Appearances==
*[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] {{Reprint|Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)}} {{1st}}
